# 丘멆잺丘멆잺丘멆잺 Under Construction 丘멆잺丘멆잺丘멆잺

Just kidding, we have no detail yet, other than the fact it's on 17-19 July.

 You can expedite this by encouraging your fellow BSF leaders to RSVP to the event. 
 
 In the meanwhile, please enjoy the following representation of the AL brain hard at work planning for retreat:

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=h9uFQv3t1AU&list=RDh9uFQv3t1AU >}}
